title: Leonida
description: The fictional state in which Grand Theft Auto VI is set, designed to resemble Florida, containing Neon-soaked streets of Vice City and beyond.

title: Vice City
description: A metropolitan city located within the State of Leonida, returning as the main location in Grand Theft Auto VI.

title: Ambrosia
description: An agricultural zone known for its crop fields, country roads, local biker clubs, and mud-washing salons.

title: Port Gellhorn
description: A rural town located in the State of Leonida, containing warehouses, grow houses, and local establishments.

title: Mount Kalaga
description: A national landmark and state park situated against Leonida's northern border, offering hunting, fishing, and off-road dirt bike trails.

title: Leonida Keys
description: A scenic coastal island district in southern Leonida, known for marine activities, local drug smuggling, and local wildlife.

title: Grassrivers
description: A vast swampy wilderness zone populated by wildlife, alligators, and traversed by airboat operators and local influencers.

title: Rideout Customs
description: Transform vanilla vehicles into magnificent works of art with detailed interiors, exquisite rims, and donk stylings. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: Sara's Unisex Salon
description: Get signature salon styles for both Jason and Lucia, including facial hair for Jason and makeup and nails for Lucia. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: Stock 305
description: Style various unique and exclusive looks for Jason and Lucia at Stockyard’s premier destination for elevated streetwear. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: Electric Fang Tattoo
description: Stockyard’s most iconic ink bar, with over 50 signature tattoos for both Jason and Lucia — all designed by the artist collective FAILE. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: One-Eyed Willie’s
description: This mod shop in Lake Leonida specializes in off-road modifications and hand-painted automotive artistry. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: PTT YOUNGIN$ Illegal Goods Store
description: Raid the compound of one of Southside Vice City’s loudest and most socially active gangs and escape safely to score some special items and distinct contraband. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: Classic Car Collection
description: Track down a variety of abandoned classic and work-in-progress project cars and revitalize them to their former glory in this special commission from eccentric collector and local fixer, Wyman. Only open for business with the Ultimate Edition.

title: Lucia Caminos
description: One of the two main playable protagonists of Grand Theft Auto VI, seen in Trailer 1 wearing prison attire and cooperating with Jason.

title: Jason Duval
description: Jason knows how he'd like it to turn out but right now, it's hard to tell. Jason wants an easy life, but things just keep getting harder.

title: Lucia (Retro Dress)
description: Lucia wearing the Retro Sequined Mini Dress from the Vintage Vice City Pack pre-order bonus.

title: Jason (Retro Suit)
description: Jason wearing the Retro Linen Suit from the Vintage Vice City Pack pre-order bonus.

title: Lucia (Macca Gear)
description: Lucia dressed in the custom Macca the Gator capsule collection apparel.

title: Jason (Macca Gear)
description: Jason dressed in the custom Macca the Gator capsule collection apparel.

title: Cal Hampton
description: Jason's friend and associate of Brian Heder. Cal feels safest hanging at home, snooping on Coast Guard communications with a few beers.

title: Boobie Ike
description: A local Vice City legend who built a business empire of real estate, a strip club, and Only Raw Records recording studio.

title: Raul Bautista
description: Confidence, charm, and cunning – Raul's a seasoned bank robber always on the hunt for talent ready to take the risks that bring the biggest rewards. Raul's recklessness raises the stakes with every score.

title: Brian Heder
description: A classic drug runner from the golden age of smuggling in the Keys. Still runs product through his boat yard and lets Jason live rent-free.

title: Real Dimez
description: Bae-Luxe and Roxy, high school friends turned local rap duo and social media influencers who leverage spicy tracks and social media.

title: Dre'Quan Priest
description: An aspiring music mogul who signed the Real Dimez to Only Raw Records, looking to break into the main Vice City scene.

title: Grotti Cheetah
description: A recurring high-performance supercar in the Grand Theft Auto series, confirmed visually via Trailer 1 cruising in Vice City.

title: '55 Vapid Stanier
description: A timeless two-tone classic sedan included in the Vintage Vice City Pack pre-order bonus.

title: '67 Vapid Dominator Buggy
description: An off-road muscle buggy built for high-performance mud trail driving, included in the Ultimate Edition.

title: Shitzu Squalo
description: A high-speed speed boat included in the Ultimate Edition, representing classic Vice City watercraft.

title: Dinka Enduro
description: A classic green off-road motorcycle parked outside Jason's safehouse, included in the Ultimate Edition.

title: Vapid Ganado Retro Build
description: An off-road SUV from the Ganado series featuring a custom modkit, included in the Ultimate Edition.

title: Crest Kayak
description: An orange kayak suited for navigating Lake Leonida and river networks, included in the Ultimate Edition.

title: '95 Grotti Cheetah
description: A classic '95 model of the legendary Grotti Cheetah supercar, included in the Ultimate Edition.

title: 9mm Pistol
description: Standard semi-automatic handgun, confirmed to be usable by Lucia and Jason in Trailer 1 during store robberies.

title: Hawk & Little Morgan Revolver
description: A powerful double-action revolver with classic Vice City engraving designs, included in the pre-order / Ultimate Edition.

title: Tropical Weapon Skin
description: An iconic tropical-pattern weapon skin, echoing Vice City's classic styling, included in the Vintage Vice City Pack pre-order bonus.

title: Trailer 1 Premiere
description: Rockstar Games officially released the first trailer for Grand Theft Auto VI, revealing Leonida, Vice City, Lucia, and a Fall 2025 release target.

title: Rockstar Games Announces Grand Theft Auto VI
description: Rockstar Games announced that Grand Theft Auto VI is coming in 2025 to PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S systems.

title: Grand Theft Auto VI Pre-Orders Now Live
description: Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI are now available worldwide, featuring the Standard Edition, Special Edition, and the Ultimate Edition with exclusive pre-order bonuses.

title: Grand Theft Auto VI Launches November 19, 2026
description: Rockstar Games has officially confirmed that Grand Theft Auto VI will launch worldwide on November 19, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

title: Ultimate Edition Content Details
description:
Welcome to Leonida, the state where anything goes. Seize everything this massive world has to offer with the Grand Theft Auto VI: Ultimate Edition, an exclusive collection of premium vehicles, weapons, apparel, and action around every corner.

Ultimate Edition bonuses are threaded across all aspects of Jason and Lucia’s story, with new items uncovered behind each chapter.
